description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story residential building set on a large rectangular green plot. The structure features clean, white exterior walls with a flat roof and a compact, geometric layout. There is a prominent entryway with a small porch area, and a driveway leading to a side parking or garage space. The property includes a circular outdoor feature, possibly a pool or garden, and a paved walkway connecting the entrance to the street. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger panes on the main facade and smaller ones on the sides. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, white, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, asymmetrical windows, and a small porch, set on a large green plot with a driveway and circular outdoor feature.
description_view_0: From this angle, the bungalow's main facade, entryway, and driveway are visible, along with the circular outdoor feature and a large expanse of green lawn.
description_view_1: This view shows the bungalow from the side, highlighting the building's depth, the driveway, and the arrangement of windows and outdoor features.
description_view_2: Here, the rear of the bungalow is visible, showing the back entrance, the circular feature, and the paved walkway leading to the street.
description_view_3: This angle presents the opposite side of the bungalow, focusing on the side wall, smaller windows, and the green plot surrounding the building.
